name: Boru Lai
summary: Internal Communications professional with 4+ years of international experience designing and delivering strategic communications across global organisations in shipping, FinTech, IoT, and e-commerce. Proven expertise in employee engagement, leadership messaging, editorial content planning, and multi-channel campaign execution. Skilled in translating complex business priorities into clear, inspiring narratives that align and engage global workforces. Multilingual: English (C1), German (B1+), Chinese (C2), Japanese (B1). Based in Germany, available immediately.
skills: Video editing (Movavi Video Suite, Adobe Premiere Pro)
